name: app-window-recorder
description: Record a launched or attached Windows app window, extract frames, and return the artifacts to Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Record a single app window and return frames.
interface.longDescription: Launch or attach to a Windows app window, capture only the window view, extract frames, and return absolute artifact paths for Codex analysis.
defaultPrompt: Record notepad.exe for 5 seconds and return the extracted frames.
List visible app windows I can attach to for capture.
Attach to an already-running app window and save a short capture.
